---

## Exit Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 0 | Script ran successfully (check output for status) |
| Non-zero | Script error (e.g. bash syntax issue, missing dep) |

---

## Thresholds Reference

| Metric | Warn | Critical |
|--------|------|----------|
| CPU usage | ≥ 70% | ≥ 90% |
| Memory usage | ≥ 80% | ≥ 95% |
| Disk usage | ≥ 80% | ≥ 90% |
| Endpoint response | ≥ 1000 ms | ≥ 3000 ms |

---

## How to Run

```bash
# Standard human-readable report
bash workspace/outputs/technical/health-check.sh

# JSON output (for automation / monitoring pipelines)
bash workspace/outputs/technical/health-check.sh --json

# Quiet (no color, no header — useful in cron logs)
bash workspace/outputs/technical/health-check.sh --quiet

# Scheduled via cron (every 15 minutes, logs to file)
# */15 * * * * bash /path/to/health-check.sh --quiet >> /var/log/navaia-health.log 2>&1

# Override Navaia root directory (if running from a different location)
NAVAIA_ROOT=/custom/path bash health-check.sh
```

---

*Script path: `workspace/outputs/technical/health-check.sh`*
